name: tandir-hw3
description: Tandir restaurant app — React + Express + MongoDB (Assignment 3)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
